title: 目標達成の後に・コード：ファイアー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is in full swing. Looking for praise,
Mayano Top Gun throws herself into our various
training methods.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bragging that she has become strong enough, she
claims she can excite me even more than Narita
Brian does with her running abilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to prove this, she decides to take on the
Kikuka Sho, one of the Triple Crown tour races
that Narita Brian herself raced in.
